prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains specifically to funding mechanisms and grants provided by the Department for Education (DfE) in England. As education policy and funding are devolved matters, it does not apply to Scotland, where education is managed by the Scottish Government and funding arrangements differ.
